durability_modes.no_fsync: denied for CDR CRITICAL governance artifacts unless exception authority exists

name: ATOMIC_APPEND_LOG_WRITER_CONTRACT_v1
required_algorithm: Validate envelope fields and allowed roots
Resolve log path and all ancestors before open
Deny path traversal, absolute-path mismatch, unsafe suffix, symlink target, symlink ancestor
Require record to be a JSON object with schema_version, event_id, timestamp_utc, source, event_type, severity, payload
Serialize with sort_keys and compact separators, allow_nan=False, ensure_ascii=False
Reject serialized record containing raw CR/LF before adding terminal newline
Compute record_sha256 over bytes without newline and line_sha256 over bytes with newline
Open with os.open flags O_WRONLY|O_CREAT|O_APPEND plus mode 0o600 by default
Write the full line using bounded write loop; verify bytes_written equals line length
fsync according to durability mode and severity policy
Emit decision packet and failure event through atomic JSON writer where available
